story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_0100_10: That was a most valuable experience.
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_0200_10:
Learning about acting has helped me grow
as an individual.
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_0300_10:
I’ve forged an even deeper bond with
Glimmora, too.
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_0400_10:
So you’ve finally learned the fun of acting,
have you?
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_0500_10: That joy is something all actors chase.
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_0600_10:
With your guidance, I was able to
understand it better.
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_0700_10:
I’m impressed how much work goes into a
single production!
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_0800_10: Theater has a lot of depth, doesn’t it.
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_0900_10:
That’s why I never tire of it. It’s just like
Pokémon battling!
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_1100_10: Do you think you’ll act again in the future?
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_1200_10:
Hmm... If the opportunity arises,
I’ll consider it.
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_1300_10: Your stage debut is complete, Geeta!
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_1400_10:
Thanks for seeing it through to the end,
despite the sudden request.
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_1500_10:
This was sort of a debut for me too, it being
my first time directing.
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_1600_10: It certainly threw me for a few loops!
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_1700_10:
But you also saw it through to the end,
Diantha! You’ve truly outdone yourself.
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_1800_10: All thanks to the Paldea Elite Four’s support!
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_2000_10:
Geeta! Good luck with your work as
Top Champion!
story_arceus_10_12000/2401_1001_2100_10:
You too, Diantha! I look forward to seeing
what you accomplish next.
